title: Prohibitions
doc_html:
Rule 3.11. Prohibitions

A. No officer of the Senate shall be assigned a state vehicle on a regular basis for Senate business or for personal use.

B. No officer of the Senate shall have a state employee assigned on a regular basis to provide service as a chauffeur.

SR 3 of 1996 RS

Rule 3.11. Prohibitions
